compressed_context:
DEF: UNFCCC=UNITED NATIONS FRAMEWORK CONVENTION ON CLIMATE CHANGE  
ADOPTION:1992-05-09 LOCATION:RIO-EARTH-SUMMIT(UNCED)  
ENTRY-INTO-FORCE:1994-03-21 AFTER RATIFICATION=50-PARTIES CONF=0.99  
OBJECTIVE: STABILIZE GHG-CONC. ∴ AVOID DANGEROUS-INTERFERENCE  
TARGET: GLOBAL-WARMING <2°C ABOVE PRE-INDUSTRIAL  
DEF: COP=CONFERENCE OF THE PARTIES  
COP3:1997-12-11 LOCATION:KYOTO ACTION:ADOPT KP  
DEF: KP=KYOTO PROTOCOL  
KP: ANNEX-I PARTIES COMMIT GHG-REDUCTION=Y/Y-5% VS1990 FOR 2008–2012  
PRINCIPLE: COMMON-BUT-DIFFERENTIATED-RESPONSIBILITIES(Art.3)  
ARTICLE-2: AIM=STABILIZE-GHG-CONC. ∧ PREVENT DANGEROUS-INTERFERENCE  
ARTICLE-4: DEVELOPED PARTIES PROVIDE FINANCE/TECH SUPPORT TO DEVELOPING  
KP ENTRY-INTO-FORCE:2005-02-16 AFTER RATIFICATION≥55-PARTIES ∧ ≥55% ANTHROCO₂  
US: SIGNS KP 1998-11-12 ∧ NO RATIFICATION ∵ SENATE(1997-07-25)[BYRD-HAGEL] OPPOSES KP WITHOUT DEVELOPING-TARGETS  
US: REMAINS NON-PARTY ∧ NO LEGAL-OBLIGATION TO KP  
DEF: GHG=GREENHOUSE-GASES
